title: Market
description: The Ultimate Quality-of-Life and Performance Boost modpack optimizes Minecraft with better performance, stunning visuals, and smooth communication, featuring Sodium, Iris Shaders, and Simple Voice Chat. Ideal for enhanced gameplay.
body:
![Banner displaying Market Graphic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dec18d8fac563a510a5b38b15e94a6112ddb28a5.gif)

# Welcome to the Ultimate **Quality-of-Life** and **Performance Boost modpack**. 

Crafted for players seeking an enhanced Vanilla Minecraft experience without sacrificing performance. Whether you're playing solo or with friends on Market SMP, this modpack ensures smooth gameplay, enhanced visuals, and a seamless communication experience. Here's what this modpack has to offer:

## Performance Enhancements

**Sodium and Sodium Extra:** Experience a significant FPS boost with these cutting-edge performance mods, making your game run buttery smooth even on lower-end systems.
**Lithium:** Optimizes game logic for an even more responsive and efficient gameplay experience.
**Dynamic FPS:** Automatically reduces resource usage when Minecraft is running in the background, giving you better multitasking capabilities.
**Indium & Nvidium:** Enhances compatibility and visual fidelity when combined with other mods, ensuring a visually stunning world.

## Visual Improvements

**Iris Shaders:** Unlock the full potential of your graphics card with stunning shaders for an immersive visual experience.
**Visuality:** Adds subtle particle effects that enhance the overall atmosphere of the game.
**Continuity:** Enjoy seamless block transitions with connected textures, making builds look more natural and polished.

## Quality of Life Upgrades

**AppleSkin:** Get detailed information on hunger and saturation, making survival more intuitive.
**Mouse Tweaks:** Optimize your inventory management with enhanced mouse functionality.
**Gamma Utils (Fullbright):** Never worry about dark caves again with adjustable brightness settings.

## Communication and Social Features

**Simple Voice Chat:** Communicate effortlessly with friends using integrated voice chat.
**More Chat History & No Chat Reports:** Keep conversations safe and secure while accessing an extended chat history for better communication.
**Chat Heads:** See who’s talking in chat with handy player head icons, making it easier to keep track of conversations.
**Text Placeholder API:** Customize in-game messages and commands with ease.

## Configuration and Utility Tools
**Cloth Config API and Mod Menu:** Easily configure mods and explore their options with a user-friendly interface.
**Reese's Sodium Options:** Fine-tune Sodium’s settings with additional customization options.
**Jade:** Get detailed information about blocks and entities directly in-game with this handy HUD.

## Compatibility and Framework

**Fabric API & Fabric Language Kotlin:** Essential libraries and language support that enable smooth integration and functionality of all mods within this pack.

This modpack is perfect for players who want a lag-free experience, advanced visual effects, and tools that streamline gameplay, communication, and mod management. Dive into your Minecraft world with the Ultimate Quality-of-Life and Performance Boost modpack and transform your gaming experience!
